narrative.body: This exemplar now separates declared API products from provider-native APIs, data access endpoints, data products, operations and schemas. It records source tier, adapter and confidence for each concept while excluding secrets and live execution.
narrative.title: UK Government APIs as an OKF control-plane view

ontology_candidates.label: schema.org APIReference
notes: Useful for publication semantics; not sufficient for executable API contracts.

summary.description: Multi-source operational view of declared public-sector API products, provider-native APIs, data access endpoints, datasets, operations, schemas and quality gaps.
notices: This is an observed public catalogue view, not an assurance register.
Formal API products, data access endpoints, data products and operations are counted separately.
API inclusion does not imply public accessibility; access conditions stay explicit.
No API keys, client secrets, tokens, certificates, or live calls are stored in the OKF bundle.
Selected concept records are also emitted as browser-compatible Markdown files.
summary.title: UK Government APIs overview

samples.notes: To use this service you will need a title number for a property or area of land. When you have these details, you can order: - an official copy of the register - an official copy of the title plan - an official copy of a conveyance referred to on the register - an official copy of a deed referred to on the register - an official copy of the lease If you’re…

samples.name: hm-land-registry-official-search-of-whole-with-priority
samples.notes: An Official Search of Whole (with priority) protects agreements between buyers, sellers and lenders. Use this service when your application relates to the whole of the registered title to protect transfers, leases and mortgages. It also prevents any registrations of adverse interest for 30 business days. It will also tell you about: - alterations made to th…
samples.title: Official Search of Whole (with priority)

samples.name: environment-agency-catchment-data
samples.notes: The Catchment Data Explorer (CDE) helps you explore and download information about the water environment. It supports and builds upon the data in the river basin management plans. The Catchment Data API complements this by providing selective programmatic access to the data. Please visit the [Defra Data Services Platform Support](https://environment.data.go…

samples.name: data-gov-uk-2005-english-nature-the-dee-estuary-biotope-survey
samples.notes: A Natural England commissioned survey conducted by the Institute of Estuarine and Coastal Studies (IECS). The survey aimed to standardise fauna, and the information for mud/sand habitats and communities of the Dee Esturay SAC, in order to act as a baseline for future management and condition monitoring. Phase I survey of the intertidal zone, mud/sand and ro…
samples.title: 2005 English Nature The Dee Estuary Biotope Survey

samples.name: data-gov-uk-2011-natural-england-north-west-region-european-marine-sites-condition-monitoring-of-littoral-f
samples.notes: A Natural England commissioned intertidal survey conducted by the Centre for Marine and Coastal Studies (CMACS). The aim of the survey was to provide a baseline dataset for future management and condition monitoring of the intertidal interest features in the Dee Estuary. Phase I Biotope Mapping including sediment cores for fauna and Particle Size Analysis.
samples.title: 2011 Natural England North West Region European Marine Sites Condition Monitoring of Littoral Features

samples.notes: This dataset is an extract of the polygon features captured in the Marine Case Management System (MCMS). Each feature represents an area of seabed which has been excluded from the licenced area which surrounds it. samples.name: uk-hydrographic-office-avcs-online-discovery-api
samples.notes: The ADMIRALTY Vector Chart Service (AVCS) Online Discovery API provides free access to a trial version of the AVCS Online Web Map Service (WMS). It is intended for use by developers from organisations who are interested in becoming re-sellers of AVCS Online. The Discovery API provides you with Electronic Navigational Charts (ENCs) along the south coast of E…
samples.title: AVCS Online Discovery API

samples.name: uk-hydrographic-office-uk-tidal-api-discovery
samples.notes: The ADMIRALTY UK Tidal API provides authoritative source of tidal height predictions for Standard and Secondary tidal level stations around the United Kingdom. Discovery provides a free 1-year subscription to access the current plus 6 days’ worth of tidal events for 607 tidal stations around the United Kingdom.
samples.title: UK Tidal API - Discovery

We do this before we make the decision of whether to issue the licence, or w…

samples.name: environment-agency-ecology-and-fish-data
samples.notes: The Ecology and Fish Data API provides access to the Environment Agency's open data on freshwater fish data, as well as freshwater and marine ecology survey data.
